text: There once was a young girl named Lucy. Lucy loved the stars. She would stay out until they blinked bright orange. She loved listening to them tell stories. She lived quietly. Then one night, the stars did just that. They told Lucy a story about a shy girl. One that went silent just like Lucy. They told her it was okay. That maybe she wasn't meant for a big city. Maybe a big sky park was just where she belonged. So she stayed. The stars. Big ones. Small ones. Every night.
